Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: What would you know about 'the real world'? I don't even need to look at you to tell that you are one of those people who sleepwalk through their entire lives.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: What do you even do all day? 'Explore'? Attend Slothian soap operas? Pretend that you're happy about having no standing at all, and being crushed under the roots of those who hold all the power?

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: Which is not even that hard to seize, by the way. You could have all this--

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Her hand sweeps across her opulent penthouse, but you have a feeling that she actually meant to sweep it across the whole world.

Choices.Text: Didn't you just 'advise' me not to get into leadership?
